name: Dextromethorpan Hydrobromide Phenylephrine HCL Chlorpheniramine Maleate Tablets
about: Dextromethorpan Hydrobromide Phenylephrine HCL Chlorpheniramine Maleate Tablets are a type of general medicine that is commonly used to treat symptoms of cough, cold, and flu. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a convenient tablet form. The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. Each box contains 20x10 tablets and should be stored in a dry and cool place.
